contact_page.title: Let's talk about your next project.
contact_page.subtitle: Whether you want to discuss job opportunities, Unreal Engine collaborations, or simply ask a question, I'm here to help.
contact_page.fun_fact: Fun Fact: The nickname @pittabio comes from a fusion of my surname first (Pittaccio) and my name later (Fabio). You can find me everywhere with this handler.

feedback.success_body: Thank you for reaching out. I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
feedback.error_body: Please try again in a moment or contact me directly via email.
feedback.network_error: Network error. Please check your connection.
